complete patch 1

I went ahead and created a patch that also includes the necessary changes to the port's files/*. Find it attached.
Please give the port with this patch applied some thorough testing, as I haven't had a chance to do that, yet. Especially the new 'blacklist.csv' that snpservices 0.2.2-8 seems to introduce isn't tested by me.
Thanks
